title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Kujaku, Unknown person #3, Jinbe as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry! It's because I distracted you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Though I should've defended against it properly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: just hurry up and lose consciousness already...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as a person with an authority rank...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As high as yours is still conscious...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to control the Seraphim!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up Luffy! If you want to save this child, we must quickly go to where vegapunk is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't stop!!! I'm spinning too much!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Ehhhh!!!! Where are you going, Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's take refuge at the factory!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
